name: lifters-skills
description: AI-native product development skills for Lifters teams
author: twinfo-io

skills.name: discovery
skills.description: Interactive feature discovery for product development teams. Conducts a structured 7-phase interview, collects reference documents, researches market benchmarks, and generates a discovery.md artifact.

skills.name: new-feature
skills.description: Generates three canonical product artifacts from an existing discovery.md: briefing.v0.md (15 sections), specs.md (SPEC-XX with 12 sections each), and wps.md (work packages with dependency map).
